articles.title: Ranked Battles Season 41 is live!
articles.snippet: The very last season of Ranked Battles in Pokémon Scarlet and Pokémon Violet has started! It uses Regulation Set I and will be up until the games' end of service. 2024 World Cup Champions Team…

articles.title: Regulation Set I is back as the official VGC format in TPCi events until 29 May!
articles.snippet: The ruleset allows the use of two Restricted Legendary Pokémon. Until Pokémon Champions becomes official for the Indianapolis Regional, we're back to the format used in the 2025 World Championships!

articles.title: Teams, results and all info from the 2026 Seville Special Championships!
articles.snippet: Spanish player Juan Núñez has won his first major title! Juan defeated 2025 World Cup Champion Team Spain's Samuel Pereira in the finals of the Seville Special Championships.

articles.title: Hermann Krumrey is the 2026 Cape Town SC Champion!
articles.snippet: German player Hermann Krumrey has won his first major title! Hermann defeated South African player Chad Hull in the finals of the Cape Town Special Championships.

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Los Angeles Regional are open again!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Los Angeles Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in North America, held on 9–10 May 2026!

articles.title: Pokemon Presents February 2026
articles.snippet: Tune in for exciting Pokemon news and announcements.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Paldean Fates Now Available
articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.

articles.title: Pokemon Scarlet and Violet DLC: The Indigo Disk
articles.snippet: Explore the Terarium and encounter legendary Pokemon.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Announced
articles.snippet: A special expansion featuring Terastal Pokemon coming January 2025.

articles.title: Pokemon Legends: Z-A Coming 2026
articles.snippet: The next Pokemon RPG set in the Kalos region announced.
